en: Hey all you intermediate English learners and above out there, why don't you motivate
ko: 중급 이상 영어 학습자 여러분, 저 타워처럼 되어 보는 건 어떨까요?

en: yourself and become like that tower. See the tower? When you improve your English and your
phrasal verbs, you light up like that tower and everybody looks at you and you're attractive
ko: 구동사를 배우면, 저 타워처럼 빛나게 되고 모두가 당신을 보고 매력적으로 느끼고

en: to people and people want to know you. So that's my tip for you, right? Start learning,
ko: 사람들이 당신을 알고 싶어해요. 그래서 제 팁은요, 맞죠? 배우기 시작하세요,

en: start improving and light yourself up, become better like the tower.
ko: 향상시키기 시작하고 자신을 빛내세요, 저 타워처럼 더 나은 사람이 되세요.
